name: Baker Hughes Co
summary: Baker Hughes Company is an energy technology company operating in over 120 countries, providing products and services across the energy and industrial value chain. Its two segments, Oilfield Services & Equipment (OFSE) and Industrial & Energy Technology (IET), deliver drilling, completions, artificial lift, subsea systems, gas turbines, compression, LNG equipment, industrial software, and emissions-reduction solutions including CCUS, hydrogen, and geothermal technologies.

products.name: Drilling Services
products.description: Directional drilling, logging-while-drilling, surface logging, and remote operations for well construction.

products.name: Drill Bits
products.description: Polycrystalline, roller cone, hybrid, and in-bit sensing drill bits for oilfield operations.

products.name: Completions & Intervention Systems
products.description: Wellbore construction, upper/lower completions, unconventional multistage completions, and workover systems.

products.name: Electrical Submersible Pumping Systems
products.description: Artificial lift systems including ESPs, surface pumping systems, rigless deployment, sensors, and gauges.

products.name: Aquaness Wholesale Chemicals
products.description: Upstream, downstream, and specialty oilfield and industrial chemicals.

products.name: Subsea Trees and Controls
products.description: Subsea trees, controls, manifolds, wellheads, and premium casing connectors for subsea operations.

products.name: Flexible Pipe Systems
products.description: Subsea risers, flowlines, jumpers, and reinforced thermoplastic pipe for onshore/offshore applications.

products.name: Gas Technology Equipment
products.description: Aero-derivative and heavy-duty gas turbines, steam turbines, centrifugal and reciprocating compressors, and generators.

products.name: LNG Equipment & Services
products.description: Compression, power generation, and turnkey solutions for LNG liquefaction and regasification projects.

products.name: Industrial Software (iCenter, Bently Nevada, Reuter-Stokes, Waygate)
products.description: Asset performance management, condition monitoring, non-destructive testing, and industrial inspection software and hardware.

products.name: CCUS Solutions
products.description: Integrated carbon capture, utilization, and storage solutions for energy and industrial customers.

products.name: Hydrogen Solutions
products.description: Products and services for hydrogen production, transportation, storage, and distribution.

products.name: Clean Power Solutions
products.description: Lower-carbon intensity power generation solutions integrating renewable energy sources.

products.name: OFSE Digital Group
products.description: Digital tools combining domain expertise with technology to improve operational safety, performance, and sustainability.

partnerships.description: Strategic partnership focused on geothermal energy development.
Strategic partnership advancing carbon capture solutions.
Strategic partnership focused on e-fuels technology development.
Strategic partnership advancing clean power technology.
Joint venture announced June 2025; Baker Hughes contributed surface pressure control business, formation completed January 1, 2026.
